chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Misc: Application No.S-395 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 12.12.2025 Ms.Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for State ******* None has appeared on behalf of the applicant since 04.02.2025, nor has any intimation been received. It appears that the applicant has lost interest in pursuing this matter. Accordingly, the application is dismissed for non‐prosecution. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
